deploy.startCommand: pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx pyjwt cryptography asyncpg bcrypt && python -c "import urllib.request, time; urllib.request.urlretrieve('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SavoFats/crypto-agent-back/main/main.py?t=' + str(int(time.time())), 'app.py')" && uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
